title: Led lamp
abstract: An LED lamp with a bulb shape comprises a glass bulb shell (1), an LED assembly (4), a heat sink (3) and a lamp head (2). The LED assembly (4) is configured to sleeve a first end of the heat sink (3), and the lamp head (2) is configured to sleeve a second end of the heat sink (3). The glass bulb shell (1) covers the heat sink (3). The LED assembly (4) is located in a space formed between the glass bulb shell (1) and the heat sink (3). Heat generated by the LED assembly (4) is transferred to the lamp head (2) and the glass bulb shell (1) through the heat sink (3) when the LED assembly (4) emits light.
